title: 6 x 190g Butane-Propane Mixture Pierceable Gas Can Cartridges for Camping Stoves With Gas Stop System Complies With EN 417
features: High performance and quality: Piercable cartridge with high-performance butane/propane mix
Hassle free installation: Simply pierce the device into the cartridge, pierceable cartridges can’t be disconnected once they’ve been plugged into an appliance, suitable for more intensive/longer use
Gas lock system: The system prevents the majority of residual gas from escaping the cartridge when accidentally disconnecting it from the appliance, thereby also preventing flare-ups
Compatibility and availability: Fits all devices which run on piercable cartridges (example: Bleuet 206 Plus stove or Lumogaz C206 lantern); worldwide availability in more than 50 countries
Scope of supply: XQ GAS 200 gas cartridge; size approximately: 9 x 9.5 cm, weight: 280 g, capacity/gas: 190 g; ideal for camping, garden, balcony or terrace
description: Pierceable cartridges can’t be disconnected once they’ve been plugged into an appliance, so they’re suitable for more intensive or longer use. The cartridge has a new integrated flow reducing system, the gas lock system, which is compliant to the new European standard EN 417:2012 legislation. The system prevents the majority of residual gas from escaping the cartridge when accidentally disconnecting it from the appliance, thereby also preventing flare-ups.
